{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323195314FC561C95E6EA40DD2A9B"}"},"total":600},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7263033851558069004","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢很喜欢这种类型的小说，但有一些是往死里绝望恐怖，但像你这种就是往死里爽[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691056917,"group_id":"7238662443319168035","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwNCvKjz9qr0uL1YmhOAph1PepEPx1/c3yuYzyyZ9V7F","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/46d3d1839caf4f118b86b1f01bef6d64~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788179&x-signature=rJWwv%2BXWwkKbcTjden%2BAea9ovN8%3D","user_id":"1336651631826031","user_name":"我的，我最爱的美姬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1336651631826031","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7238662443319168035","book_info":{"abstract":"在人们死后的怪谈世界里，每个玩家都会获得随机天赋技能！
但......苏铭的技能似乎与别人有些不太一样？
【为所欲为】：只要你遵守规则，无论规则是真的还是假的，诡异都拿你没办法！
【认贼作父】：遇到诡异或者玩家你可以叫对方一声义父，对方会无条件保护你，偏袒你！
【钞能力】：没有什么是钱不能解决的，如果有......那一定是你给的不够多！
【众生平等】：你所受到的伤害大家平摊，而自身并不受此影响！
【亿点幸运】：幸运点拉满，你现在可以无限作死，遇到任何生命威胁都会化险为夷！
【不玩咯】：向副本投放一颗核弹，除你之外所有人直接被淘汰！
